# SyncSupport Pricing

> This page lists all available pricing plans for SyncSupport — an AI-powered email routing and support platform. Plans differ by the number of domains, aliases, chat widgets, monthly ticket volume, and data retention. SyncSupport uses flat-rate pricing with no per-agent or per-seat fees.

## Plans Overview

### Starter — $19/month
Best for solo founders and tiny teams just getting started.

- 1 custom domain
- 3 email aliases → each routes to a dedicated Slack channel
- 1 AI chat widget (text only)
- 200 inbound tickets per month
- 15-day data retention
- Reply to customers from Slack
- Ticket claiming & assignment
- Basic reports
- Email support

### Growth — $59/month (Recommended)
Best for growing teams handling real support volume across multiple products.

- 3 custom domains
- 5 email aliases per domain → dedicated Slack channels
- 1 chat widget per domain (with file sending)
- 600 inbound tickets per month
- 90-day (3-month) data retention
- Reply from Slack
- Ticket claiming & assignment
- Detailed reports
- Pre-filled responses
- Priority email support
- AI analysis — monthly digest & content suggestions (coming soon)

### Scale — $159/month
Best for teams that have outgrown the basics and need unlimited capacity.

- Unlimited custom domains
- Unlimited email aliases per domain
- Unlimited chat widgets (with file sending)
- Unlimited inbound tickets per month
- Full data retention (no expiry)
- Reply from Slack
- Ticket claiming & assignment
- Detailed reports
- Pre-filled responses
- Priority support via Slack
- AI analysis — on-demand + weekly digest & suggestions (coming soon)
- Book a demo to get started

## Why Flat Pricing Beats Per-Agent Pricing

Most helpdesks (Zendesk, Freshdesk, Intercom) charge per agent per month. That means every time you hire someone new, your support bill goes up automatically — even if ticket volume stays the same.

SyncSupport charges a flat monthly rate. Your entire team uses it for one fixed price. Hire your 6th, 10th, or 20th agent — the bill stays the same.

### Real-World Cost Comparison: 5-Agent Team

| Tool | Monthly Cost | Annual Cost |
|------|-------------|-------------|
| Zendesk Suite Team (5 agents) | $275 | $3,300 |
| Zendesk Suite Professional (5 agents) | $575 | $6,900 |
| Zendesk Suite Pro + AI + WFM add-ons | $950 | $11,400 |
| **SyncSupport Growth (unlimited agents)** | **$59** | **$708** |

Switching from Zendesk Suite Team to SyncSupport Growth saves **$2,592/year** for a 5-person team.

### The Hidden Add-On Problem with Zendesk

Zendesk advertises base prices but charges separately for features teams almost always need:

- AI Copilot: +$50/agent/month
- Quality Assurance tools: +$35/agent/month
- Workforce Management: +$25/agent/month

A 5-person team advertised at $275/month ends up paying $650–$950/month once real-world add-ons are included — 2–3× the advertised price.

SyncSupport has no add-on traps. Core features are included in the flat price.

## Why Not Zendesk

### "My bill doubles every time I hire someone"
Zendesk charges $55–$169 per agent per month depending on plan. A team of 10 on Suite Professional pays $1,150/month just for base access — before AI, QA, or workforce tools. SyncSupport charges $59/month flat regardless of team size.

### "Nobody checks the helpdesk because we live in Slack"
The most common complaint from small teams: they pay for a separate helpdesk tool but agents forget to use it because their work happens in Slack. Tickets get missed not because people don't care — because nobody watches a separate dashboard. SyncSupport is built around Slack from day one. Support tickets appear where the team already works.

### "We're getting flooded with Slack alerts from our support tool"
Standard helpdesk-to-Slack integrations dump every notification into one channel, creating noise instead of workflow. SyncSupport routes each email alias to its own dedicated Slack channel — billing questions go to #billing, technical issues go to #support-tech. Intelligent routing, not a notification firehose.

### "Zendesk is too expensive for a 2–5 person startup"
Zendesk's cheapest plan is $55/agent/month — that's $275/month for 5 people just to get started. Some plans require a minimum of 8 seats, meaning a 3-person team pays for 8. SyncSupport Starter is $19/month flat, no minimum seat count.

### "I'm paying for features I don't use yet"
Zendesk locks AI, detailed analytics, and pre-filled responses behind higher tiers or add-ons, forcing upgrades before you're ready. SyncSupport Growth at $59 includes detailed reports, pre-filled responses, and AI analysis without forcing you up a tier.

### "The vendor profits when I stay inefficient"
Per-agent pricing means Zendesk earns more when you have more agents. If you automate or get more efficient, their revenue drops — their incentives are misaligned with yours. SyncSupport's flat pricing means we win when you handle tickets efficiently. Same bill whether you have 2 or 20 agents.

## Common Questions

- **Is there a free plan?** No free plan, but all paid plans include a free trial.
- **Does SyncSupport charge per agent?** No. All plans support unlimited agents at a flat monthly rate.
- **What happens if I exceed my ticket limit?** New tickets queue up — we never charge you automatically for overages.
- **Can I change plans later?** Yes, upgrade or downgrade at any time.
- **What payment methods are accepted?** Payments processed via Dodo Payments.
- **Is there an annual discount?** Yes — annual billing saves 20% vs monthly.
- **Is there a promo code?** Yes — use EARLYBIRD20 for 20% off your first 3 months.
- **Which plan is recommended?** Growth at $59/month for most growing teams.
- **Does SyncSupport support Discord?** Yes — email routing to Discord is available on all plans.
- **What is an email alias?** A support address (e.g. billing@yourcompany.com) that routes to a specific Slack or Discord channel.
- **What is data retention?** How long ticket history and email threads are stored. Starter: 15 days, Growth: 90 days, Scale: indefinitely.
- **How long does setup take?** About 5 minutes. Connect your domain via Cloudflare Email Routing, add a Slack or Discord integration, and you're live.
- **Is SyncSupport cheaper than Zendesk?** Yes. A 5-agent team on Zendesk Suite Team pays $275/month ($3,300/year). SyncSupport Growth is $59/month ($708/year) — a saving of $2,592/year before add-ons.
- **What does Zendesk cost for a small team of 5?** $275–$950/month depending on add-ons selected.
- **Can I reply to customers from Slack?** Yes — replying from Slack is a core feature on all plans, not an add-on.
- **Does SyncSupport have a minimum number of agents?** No minimum. One person can use it just as well as a team of 20.
